rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains an internal logical inconsistency: the initial SA definition counts both correct answers on clear prompts AND clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts, but the 'concrete' restatement defines SA as only correct answers on clear prompts divided by 800—omitting the ambiguous-prompt half entirely.
